title: Stavanger Heavy Rain
lead: Stavanger is experiencing a critical heavy rain event with a Z-Score of -3.17. This anomaly has a significant impact on the city's operations.
body:
The current weather conditions in Stavanger are characterized by heavy rain, with an intensity that is rare for this time of year. 
 The HDD value of 12.1 GG indicates a significant amount of heating degree days, which is unusual for a city that typically has a mild climate. 
 The high humidity level of 87% and wind speed of 12.2 km/h are also contributing to the uncomfortable conditions.
conclusion: Activate emergency protocols to mitigate the effects of the heavy rain.
